title: Projektmanager im Portfoliomanagement (all genders)
bonus_skills: Background in real estate or office management
matched_skills: Portfolio and project management (HSBC 6 workstreams, ECE Group)
Performance analysis and KPI reporting (HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd, VfB Stuttgart)
Stakeholder and customer coordination (HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd, ECE Group)
Partner and vendor management (IPC, GRG Banking)
Real estate / marketplace sector experience (ECE Group)
missing_skills: Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) or advertising media industry experience
Operations management of physical infrastructure or ad screens
Explicit SVERWEIS / XVERWEIS / Pivot proficiency (Excel listed but not detailed)
core_responsibilities: Independently manage a portfolio of new and existing location partners in the DOOH network
Identify, evaluate and qualify potential location partners to grow the digital advertising network
Oversee the operations management system and ensure smooth functioning of ad screens
Analyse and report portfolio performance; derive and implement optimisation strategies
Manage and develop contracts with location partners; maintain all location and contract data
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Excel proficiency with specific functions (VLOOKUP / XLOOKUP equivalent, Pivot Tables) used in previous roles
Emphasise portfolio and partner management experience from HSBC (6 workstreams) and ECE Group
Lead with ECE Group real estate/marketplace background as industry adjacency to location-based media
Showcase structured performance reporting and KPI analysis from HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd as proxy for portfolio performance reporting
Stress self-directed, detail-oriented data maintenance work and stakeholder communication skills
Mention process optimisation and spreadsheet automation work at ECE Group to align with continuous improvement culture
